_notes: current_price_eur = Cardmarket Price Trend (EUR). Run the scraper to get live values.
price_from_eur = Cardmarket lowest listing (global). Set by scraper.
price_from_filtered_eur = lowest listing from BE/DE/NL sellers, English sealed. Set by scraper.
tags: single_print_special, anniversary, pokemon_center_exclusive, new_rarity_debut, chase_card_hype, nostalgia_set, standard
reprint_status: single_print, limited_reprint, standard_rotation, ongoing_reprint, pokemon_center_exclusive
months_to_oop = estimated months until product is no longer available at retail.
